public_reputation: Reactor-side adept specializing in heat exchange, ward frost, and pressure-balance rites.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a elementalist still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of elementalist in and around Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh workable through the obligations of elementalist while managing the immediate pressure of contamination strain in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh, that usually means carrying contamination strain, calendar contradiction, tundra hazard without letting the role of elementalist visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Talar Icepulse needs help with a problem in Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Talar Icepulse can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Talar Icepulse can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained.
public_signal: Talar Icepulse carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh: the part of Crystalline Vault Commune, Sheresh where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
